industry_alignment.description: AI sub-sector match (infra, agents, vertical, foundation models)

stage_compatibility.description: Investor check size vs founder raise stage

founder_track_record.description: Previous exits, big-tech pedigree, academic credentials

brand_positioning.description: Media presence, thought leadership, social proof

portfolio_similarity.description: Overlap with investor's existing portfolio themes

conversion_likelihood.description: Probability of meeting acceptance and investment

scoring.70-79: Good match — worth pursuing with warm intro
scoring.60-69: Moderate match — consider after higher-priority targets
